data.title: CryptoQuant: Whale holdings decreased by about 30,000 BTC this week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoQuant published an article on the X platform stating that whales' positions decreased by 30,000 bitcoins this week. On April 7, as the profit margin dropped to 33%, miners' daily outflow reached 15,000 bitcoins. The current net accumulation rate of bitcoin has dropped to the lowest level since February.

data.title: China Criticizes U.S. Tariff Increases on Exports
data.description: According to Foresight News, China has observed that tariffs on certain Chinese exports to the United States have reached a cumulative rate of 245%. This situation highlights the extent to which the U.S. has weaponized tariffs, according to Chinese officials. China has previously expressed its stance against the unilateral imposition of tariffs by the U.S. and regards the current tariff situation as an irrational numbers game. However, Chinese authorities have stated that if the U.S. continues to substantially harm China's interests, they are prepared to take firm countermeasures.

data.title: Panama City Council Approves Cryptocurrency Payments for Public Services
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Panama City's Mayor Mayer Mizrachi has announced that the city council has voted in favor of accepting cryptocurrency payments. Citizens can now use cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), USD Coin (USDC), and Tether (USDT) to pay taxes, fees, tickets, and licenses.

The legislation mandates that public institutions must receive funds in U.S. dollars. To facilitate this, the city has partnered with a bank responsible for handling cryptocurrency transactions.

data.title: AI Blockchain Project DIN Faces Twitter Account Hack
data.description:
According to PANews, the official Twitter account of AI blockchain project DIN (@din_lol_) has been compromised by hackers. The information currently being posted is not from the official team, and users are advised to avoid clicking any links or engaging with the content. Additionally, the X account of DIN founder Harold has also been hacked.

The DIN team is actively addressing the situation and advises users to rely on official channels for further updates.

data.title: Analysis: If BTC falls below the $83,000 support level, it may face the risk of falling to $75,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CoinDesk analyst and market technical expert Omkar Godbole wrote that Bitcoin's recovery seems to have stagnated, $86,000 has become a key resistance area, and key momentum indicators indicate a possible bearish shift. A drop below $83,000 may trigger a sell-off, and a closing price above $86,000 is required to continue to recover. If BTC falls below the $83,000 support level, it may face the risk of falling to $75,000. (CoinDesk)

data.title: U.S. retail sales rose 1.4% in March, the largest increase since January 2023
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. retail sales in March recorded a monthly rate of 1.4%, the largest increase since January 2023, with an expected increase of 1.3% and a previous value of 0.20%. After the data was released, the U.S. dollar index DXY fell 12 points in the short term and is now at 99.62. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bedrock: Kodiak's BR/wBERA Reward Pool Approved by Berachain Foundation's RFRV Batch 3
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bedrock posted on the X platform that Kodiak's BR/wBERA reward pool has been approved by the Berachain Foundation RFRV third batch, which will help maintain the sustainable flow of income for the Bera and Bedrock ecosystems.

data.title: Mantra CEO Pledges to Burn His Team Tokens After Major 90% OM Crash
data.description:
John Patrick Mullin, co-founder and CEO of Mantra, claims he’ll burn his OM after the token’s Sunday crash.
source: https://decrypt.co/315077/mantra-ceo-pledges-to-burn-his-team-tokens-after-major-90-om-crash

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury bonds may help US refinance $14T debt — VanEck exec
data.description:
VanEck’s head of research has pitched a new type of US Treasury bond partially backed by Bitcoin to help refinance $14 trillion in US debt. Matthew Sigel pitched the concept of “BitBonds” — US Treasury bonds with exposure to Bitcoin (BTC) — at the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Summit 2025 on April 15. The new 10-year bonds would be composed of 90% US traditional debt and 10% BTC exposure, Sigel said, appealing to both the US Treasury and global investors. Even in a scenario where Bitcoin “goes to zero,” BitBonds would allow the US to save money to refinance the estimated $14 trillion of debt that will mature in the next three years and will need to be refinanced, he said
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-treasury-bond-refinance-14-trillion-us-debt-vaneck?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: MELANIA community allocated address 2 hours ago continued to transfer 4 million tokens to the new address, worth 1.72 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the sale of MELANIA project through group liquidity is still continuing: the community allocated address continued to transfer 4 million MELANIA (1.72 million US dollars) to the new address 2 hours ago, and then added 1.2 million MELANIA ($0.52M) to Meteora. One-sided liquidity, these MELANIA added to the liquidity pool will be exchanged for SOL within the set range.
